version_description: This version has a more accurate timing with chord changes at beat "1" and "2 AND" as well as more accurate chords.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: The Man Who Cant Be Moved

content:
[Intro]
[ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Fsus4[/ch]   [ch]Gm[/ch]   (x4)
[ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]Fsus4[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Cm7[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                 [ch]Fsus4[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch] 
   I'm still alive but I'm barely breathing[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm[/ch]               [ch]Fsus4[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]
Just prayin' to a god that I don't believe in [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Gm[/ch]         [ch]Fsus4[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]
'Cause I got time while she got freedom[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Gm[/ch]                  [ch]Fsus4[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]
'Cause when a heart breaks no it don't break even[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]               [ch]Fsus4[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]
   Her best days will be some of my worst [/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                 [ch]Fsus4[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Cm7[/ch]
   She finally met a man that's gonna put her first[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Gm[/ch]             [ch]Fsus4[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Cm7[/ch]
While I'm wide awake she's no trouble sleeping[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Gm[/ch]                  [ch]Fsus4[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Cm7[/ch]
'Cause when a heart breaks no it don't break even, even, no[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Gm7[/ch]
   What am I supposed to do when the best part of me was always you, and[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]                           [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Gm7[/ch]   
   What am I supposed to say when I'm all choked up that you're OK, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch]  
       I'm falling to pieces, yeah [/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch]  
       I'm falling to pieces[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]Fsus4[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab]     [ch]Gm[/ch]             [ch]Fsus4[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]    
They say bad things happen for a reason [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gm[/ch]            [ch]Fsus4[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch] 
But no wise words gonna stop the bleeding[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Gm[/ch]             [ch]Fsus4[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch] 
'Cause she's moved on while I'm still grieving [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gm[/ch]                  [ch]Fsus4[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Cm7[/ch]  
And when a heart breaks no it don't break even, even, no[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Gm7[/ch]
   What am I gonna do when the best part of me was always you, and[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]                           [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Gm7[/ch]   
   What am I supposed to say when I'm all choked up that you're OK, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch]  
       I'm falling to pieces, yeah [/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch]  
       I'm falling to pieces[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]Gm7[/ch]  
       I'm falling to pieces   (One still in love while the other one's leaving)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]                                 [ch]Gm7[/ch]  
       I'm falling to pieces   (Cause when a heart breaks no it don't break even)[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]F/A[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]  (x2)

[Bridge]
[tab]            [ch]Gm[/ch]                 [ch]F/A[/ch]
Oh, you got his heart and my heart and none of the pain[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
You took your suitcase, I took the blame. [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Gm[/ch]                  [ch]F/A[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch] 
Now I'm tryna make sense of what little remains, oh[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
'Cause you left me with no love, no love to my name. [/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                 [ch]Fsus4[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch] 
   I'm still alive but I'm barely breathing[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm[/ch]               [ch]Fsus4[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]
Just prayin' to a god that I don't believe in [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Gm[/ch]         [ch]Fsus4[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]
'Cause I got time while she got freedom[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Gm[/ch]                  [ch]Fsus4[/ch]
'Cause when a heart breaks no it don't break[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
No, it don't break[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]                  [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
No, it don't break even, no[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Gm7[/ch]
   What am I gonna do when the best part of me was always you, and[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]                           [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Gm7[/ch]   
   What am I supposed to say when I'm all choked up that you're OK, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch]  
       I'm falling to pieces, yeah [/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch]  
       I'm falling to pieces, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]Gm7[/ch]  
       I'm falling to pieces   (One still in love while the other one's leaving)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]                                 [ch]Gm7[/ch]  
       I'm falling to pieces   (Cause when a heart breaks no it don't break even)[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Gm7[/ch]   (x2)

[Outro]
[tab]                [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Fsus4[/ch]   [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Oh, it don't break even, no[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Fsus4[/ch]   [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Oh, it don't break even, no[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Fsus4[/ch]   [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Oh, it don't break even, no[/tab]

[Ending]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Fsus4[/ch]   [ch]Gm7[/ch]
(repeat and fade)[/tab]
